package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoroutineForSyncWork() string {
    ruleID := "goroutine_for_sync_work"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`go func() { result <- compute() }()` followed by `<-result` where the goroutine is immediately awaited"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
